text.title: growth-podcast-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-podcast-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generic pitch with "I'm a huge fan of your show" opener and no episode reference.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Signals mass templating; hosts delete immediately. 200-word personalized pitch with specific episode reference outperforms by 3-5x.

failure-mode.description: Preparing only one topic angle for the pitch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hosts often prefer a different angle; offering 3 distinct angles increases booking rate significantly.

failure-mode.description: No CTA during the appearance (no mention of where to find more).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Listeners who are not directed to a specific action take none; every appearance needs a clear verbal CTA.
